system.description:
You might need that again! You gain a Personal Stash that allows you to store objects created by your Anomaly. Any time one of your Anomaly abilities creates something, you may keep a single copy of what you made in your Stash. In addition, you can safely hide any amount of mundane non-living objects inside.

Only you may use your Stash. If it is taken from you, it loses its supernatural properties, and you may produce another Stash with access to everything stored in the original. Choose a look for your Stash or make your own:

Wheeled Backpack

Messenger Bag

Stuffed Tiger

Freshness-Sealed Food Container

To-Do List

Spray Can

You may produce something from this space at any time by identifying the item and rolling [quality].
system.synopsis: Gain a place to store your stuff

outcomes.eachplus3: you can retrieve an additional item before rolling again.
outcomes.failure: pass the GM your list of objects. They decide what leaves the space – it can never be put back in again.
